title: Add pre-build terrain clearance phase
description:
## Problem
The bot places wall blocks into existing terrain (hills, slopes) because the flat-area scanner finds "flat" ground but doesn't verify that the 3D build volume is clear of terrain. Terrain overlap causes blocks to be placed inside dirt/stone instead of replacing it with the correct material.

## Required Work
1. Add pre-build terrain survey: scan all target positions in the blueprint's bounding box
2. Count positions that already contain non-air blocks
3. Emit `MineBlock` actions for terrain blocks at blueprint positions before the placing phase
4. Log: count of terrain-overlapping positions found during build decomposition
5. After terrain clearance, proceed with normal placement

## Priority: P1
## Labels: placement, sprint-42, terrain-clearance
